pages.title: What PreFabs Expose
pages.text: PreFabs don't expose capabilities to adjacent blocks - they actively extract/insert each tick.$(br2)$(bold)Why no capabilities:$() $(li)PreFabs are routers, not inventories $(li)Active transport (PreFab initiates) vs. passive (adjacent blocks query) $(li)Simpler implementation

pages.title: What PreFabs Query
pages.text: $(bold)PULL faces (extract from Overworld)$(): $(li)`IItemHandler` - Extract items from chests, hoppers, machines $(li)`IFluidHandler` - Extract fluids from tanks (future) $(li)`IEnergyStorage` - Extract energy from batteries (future)$(br2)$(bold)PUSH faces (insert to Overworld)$(): $(li)`IItemHandler` - Insert items to chests, hoppers, machines $(li)`IFluidHandler` - Insert fluids to tanks (future) $(li)`IEnergyStorage` - Insert energy to batteries (future)
